name: product-wiki
description: A product wiki harness for building software with coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Route product requests through a living product wiki before code.
interface.longDescription: Product Wiki helps coding agents turn feature ideas, bug reports, and workflow changes into reviewed product wiki changes, executable checks, and implementation steps before code.
defaultPrompt: Draft the first product wiki for this repo.
Turn this feature request into a wiki proposal.
Compile the approved proposal into checks and code.
